doc_name: Reserve Bank of India (Commercial Banks - Resource Raising Norms).pdf

actionables.object: long-term bonds with minimum maturity of seven years to raise resources to finance eligible infrastructure/affordable housing loans
actionables.trigger_or_condition: for the purpose of raising resources to finance lending to long term projects in infrastructure sub-sectors and individual housing loans under affordable housing sub-sector (as per HML)
actionables.evidence_quote: A bank can issue long-term bonds with a minimum maturity of seven years
actionables.source_location: Chapter II - Issue of Long-Term Bonds for Financing Infrastructure Sub-Sectors (pp.3-6)
actionables.implementation_notes: If issuing these bonds, ensure end-use aligns to HML-defined infrastructure sub-sectors / affordable housing sub-sector.
actionables.validation_notes: Grounded in para 4. Note: minimum maturity requirement is also captured as a mandatory condition in ACT-004 (overlap/duplicate on maturity aspect).

impact_dropdown.label: No Significant Impact on occurrence of regulatory breach

Engineering Division 1 Unit 1.implementation_notes: If issuing these bonds, ensure end-use aligns to HML-defined infrastructure sub-sectors / affordable housing sub-sector.

actionables.object: the instrument is fully paid, redeemable and unsecured; ranks pari-passu with other uninsured, unsecured creditors
actionables.trigger_or_condition: when issuing long-term bonds for financing infrastructure sub-sectors
actionables.evidence_quote: The instrument shall be fully paid, redeemable and unsecured.
actionables.source_location: Chapter II - Issue of Long-Term Bonds for Financing Infrastructure Sub-Sectors (pp.3-6)
actionables.implementation_notes: Validate term sheet and legal documentation for ‘fully paid’, ‘redeemable’, ‘unsecured’, and pari-passu ranking language.
actionables.validation_notes: Grounded in para 5(2). Text also states pari-passu ranking; evidence_quote captures the first sentence but closely matches the source.

actionables.object: the bonds in Indian Rupees
actionables.trigger_or_condition: when issuing long-term bonds for financing infrastructure sub-sectors
actionables.evidence_quote: The bonds shall be denominated in Indian Rupees.
actionables.source_location: Chapter II - Issue of Long-Term Bonds for Financing Infrastructure Sub-Sectors (pp.3-6)
actionables.implementation_notes: Restrict issuance currency to INR in issuance systems and offer documents.
actionables.validation_notes: Grounded in para 5(3).

actionables.object: the bonds have a minimum maturity period of seven years
actionables.trigger_or_condition: when issuing long-term bonds for financing infrastructure sub-sectors
actionables.evidence_quote: The bonds shall have a minimum maturity period of seven years.
actionables.source_location: Chapter II - Issue of Long-Term Bonds for Financing Infrastructure Sub-Sectors (pp.3-6)
actionables.implementation_notes: Configure product parameters to prevent issuance with maturity below 7 years.
actionables.validation_notes: Grounded in para 5(4).

actionables.object: regulatory incentives only to bonds used to incrementally finance long term projects in infrastructure sub-sectors
actionables.trigger_or_condition: when claiming/availing regulatory incentives on long-term bonds
actionables.evidence_quote: the regulatory incentives shall be restricted to the bonds that are used to incrementally finance
actionables.source_location: Chapter II - Issue of Long-Term Bonds for Financing Infrastructure Sub-Sectors (pp.3-6)
actionables.implementation_notes: Maintain auditable linkage between bond proceeds and incremental eligible lending.
actionables.validation_notes: Grounded in para 5(5) (restriction of incentives to incremental financing).

actionables.object: prior approval from the Reserve Bank for incremental infrastructure and affordable housing loans acquired from other banks/FIs to be reckoned for regulatory incentives
actionables.trigger_or_condition: if incremental infrastructure and affordable housing loans are acquired from other banks or financial institutions and are to be reckoned for regulatory incentives
actionables.evidence_quote: shall require prior approval from the Reserve Bank to be reckoned for regulatory incentives
actionables.source_location: Chapter II - Issue of Long-Term Bonds for Financing Infrastructure Sub-Sectors (pp.3-6)
actionables.implementation_notes: Create RBI-approval workflow before tagging acquired loans as eligible for incentives.
actionables.validation_notes: Grounded in para 5(5) (prior RBI approval condition). Workstream adjusted: primary step is seeking approval/notification to RBI.

actionables.object: plain vanilla bonds without any embedded call or put option
actionables.trigger_or_condition: when issuing long-term bonds for financing infrastructure sub-sectors
actionables.evidence_quote: The bonds shall be issued in plain vanilla form, without any embedded call or put option.
actionables.source_location: Chapter II - Issue of Long-Term Bonds for Financing Infrastructure Sub-Sectors (pp.3-6)
actionables.implementation_notes: Ensure term sheet excludes call/put features and related derivatives/embedded options.
actionables.validation_notes: Grounded in para 5(6).

actionables.object: either a fixed rate or floating rate of interest for the bonds
actionables.trigger_or_condition: when issuing long-term bonds for financing infrastructure sub-sectors
actionables.evidence_quote: The bonds may be issued with either a fixed or floating rate of interest.
actionables.source_location: Chapter II - Issue of Long-Term Bonds for Financing Infrastructure Sub-Sectors (pp.3-6)
actionables.implementation_notes: Product governance to document selection of fixed vs floating structure.
actionables.validation_notes: Grounded in para 5(7) (permitted structure: fixed or floating).

actionables.actor: A bank issuing floating rate bonds
actionables.object: the rate of interest to a market determined benchmark
actionables.trigger_or_condition: in the case of floating rate bonds
actionables.evidence_quote: the rate of interest shall be referenced to a market determined benchmark.
actionables.source_location: Chapter II - Issue of Long-Term Bonds for Financing Infrastructure Sub-Sectors (pp.3-6)
actionables.implementation_notes: Define acceptable benchmarks and ensure documentation specifies the benchmark and reset mechanics.
actionables.validation_notes: Grounded in para 5(7) (floating rate benchmark requirement).

actionables.object: public issue or private placement
actionables.trigger_or_condition: when issuing long-term bonds for financing infrastructure sub-sectors
actionables.evidence_quote: The bonds may be issued through a public issue or private placement
actionables.source_location: Chapter II - Issue of Long-Term Bonds for Financing Infrastructure Sub-Sectors (pp.3-6)
actionables.implementation_notes: Select issuance route and align internal processes to the chosen route.
actionables.validation_notes: Grounded in para 5(8) (permitted issuance methods).

actionables.action: comply with SEBI guidelines and norms
actionables.object: applicable guidelines and norms prescribed by SEBI, including mandatory credit rating and listing requirements
actionables.trigger_or_condition: when issuing long-term bonds through public issue or private placement
actionables.evidence_quote: in full compliance with the applicable guidelines and norms prescribed by the Securities and Exchange Board of India
actionables.source_location: Chapter II - Issue of Long-Term Bonds for Financing Infrastructure Sub-Sectors (pp.3-6)
actionables.implementation_notes: Run SEBI compliance checklist covering rating, listing, disclosures, and placement/public issue requirements.
actionables.validation_notes: Grounded in para 5(8) (SEBI compliance including rating/listing).

actionables.object: eligibility for deposit insurance
actionables.trigger_or_condition: for long-term bonds issued under these Directions
actionables.evidence_quote: The bonds shall not be eligible for deposit insurance.
actionables.source_location: Chapter II - Issue of Long-Term Bonds for Financing Infrastructure Sub-Sectors (pp.3-6)
actionables.implementation_notes: Ensure disclosures/marketing material do not represent these bonds as covered by deposit insurance.
actionables.validation_notes: Grounded in para 5(9).

actionables.action: comply with statutory and regulatory requirements
actionables.object: all relevant statutory and regulatory requirements
actionables.trigger_or_condition: when issuing long-term bonds
actionables.evidence_quote: A bank issuing long-term bonds shall be required to comply with all relevant statutory and regulatory requirements.
actionables.source_location: Chapter II - Issue of Long-Term Bonds for Financing Infrastructure Sub-Sectors (pp.3-6)
actionables.implementation_notes: Maintain a consolidated compliance register for bond issuance (RBI/SEBI/Companies Act/other applicable requirements).
actionables.validation_notes: Source excerpt is truncated at 'all relevant statutory and reg' in node 0003; full sentence cannot be verified from provided text.

actionables.object: clarifications in respect of any matter covered by the Directions
actionables.trigger_or_condition: if it considers necessary, for giving effect to the provisions or to remove difficulties in application/interpretation
actionables.evidence_quote: the Reserve Bank may, if it considers necessary, issue necessary clarifications
actionables.source_location: C. Interpretations (pp.7-8)
actionables.implementation_notes: Monitor RBI clarifications and assess impact on internal policies/procedures.
actionables.validation_notes: Grounded in para 12 (RBI power to issue clarifications).

actionables.action: treat RBI interpretations as final and binding
actionables.object: interpretation of any provision of these Directions given by the Reserve Bank
actionables.trigger_or_condition: when RBI issues an interpretation of any provision of these Directions
actionables.evidence_quote: the interpretation of any provision of these Directions given by the Reserve Bank shall be final and binding.
actionables.source_location: C. Interpretations (pp.7-8)
actionables.implementation_notes: Establish internal process to disseminate RBI interpretations and update policies/controls accordingly.
actionables.validation_notes: Grounded in para 12 (final and binding interpretation clause). Workstream corrected to Legal.

actionables.object: Reserve Bank of India (Commercial Banks - Resource Raising Norms) Directions, 2025
actionables.trigger_or_condition: on the day these are placed on the official website of the Reserve Bank
actionables.effective_date: on the day these are placed on the official website of the Reserve Bank
actionables.evidence_quote: These directions shall become effective on the day these are placed on the official website of the Reserve Bank.
actionables.source_location: A. Short Title and Commencement (pp.2-2)
actionables.implementation_notes: Track publication date on RBI website as the effective date for compliance mapping.
actionables.validation_notes: Missed in extraction pass (effective date clause).

actionables.actor: commercial banks (excluding SFBs, LABs, PBs, RRBs)
actionables.object: Reserve Bank of India (Commercial Banks - Resource Raising Norms) Directions, 2025
actionables.trigger_or_condition: if the entity is a commercial bank as defined in the Directions
actionables.evidence_quote: These Directions shall be applicable to commercial banks ... excluding Small Finance Banks ... Payments Banks ... and Regional Rural Banks
actionables.source_location: B. Applicability (pp.2-2)
actionables.implementation_notes: Confirm entity classification vs excluded categories to determine applicability.
actionables.validation_notes: Missed in extraction pass (scope/applicability clause).

actionables.object: actions taken/initiated under repealed Directions/instructions/guidelines
actionables.trigger_or_condition: notwithstanding repeal of earlier directions
actionables.evidence_quote: any action taken ... under the repealed Directions ... shall continue to be governed by the provisions thereof.
actionables.source_location: A. Repeal and Saving (pp.7-7)
actionables.implementation_notes: Maintain legacy compliance mapping for actions initiated under repealed directions until closure, as required by the saving clause.
actionables.validation_notes: Missed in extraction pass; legal transition clause may need interpretation for specific action types.

actionables.action: treat existing approvals/acknowledgments as governed by the new Directions
actionables.object: approvals or acknowledgments granted under repealed directions/instructions/guidelines
actionables.trigger_or_condition: after issuance of these Directions
actionables.evidence_quote: All approvals or acknowledgments granted under these repealed lists shall be deemed as governed by these Directions.
actionables.source_location: A. Repeal and Saving (pp.7-7)
actionables.implementation_notes: Re-map previously granted RBI approvals/acknowledgments to the governance framework under the 2025 Directions.
actionables.validation_notes: Missed in extraction pass; deeming provision may require legal review for edge cases.

actionables.action: ensure compliance is additive to other laws
actionables.object: other applicable laws, rules, regulations, or directions in force
actionables.trigger_or_condition: when applying these Directions
actionables.evidence_quote: The provisions of these Directions shall be in addition to, and not in derogation of the provisions of any other laws
actionables.source_location: B. Application of other laws not barred (pp.7-7)
actionables.implementation_notes: Do not treat compliance with these Directions as a substitute for other regulatory/statutory requirements applicable to resource raising.
actionables.validation_notes: Missed in extraction pass (non-derogation clause).
